channel.title: Doomsday Radio
channel.description: A daily AI-generated doomsday survival podcast in Chinese. Exploring survival skills, resource stockpiling, and psychological resilience in a fictional post-apocalyptic world.
channel.itunes:author: Doomsday Radio
channel.itunes:summary: A daily AI-generated doomsday survival podcast in Chinese. Exploring survival skills, resource stockpiling, and psychological resilience in a fictional post-apocalyptic world.

item.title: EP003 - Community Collaboration and Resource Trading
item.description: How to build communities, establish barter systems, and develop trust networks in a post-apocalyptic world. Host Ah-Sheng shares practical tips on team building, trading protocols, and survival economics.
item.itunes:title: EP003 - Community Collaboration and Resource Trading
item.itunes:summary: Building communities, barter systems, and trust in the post-apocalyptic world.

item.title: EP001 - Pets in the Apocalypse
item.description: When doomsday comes, are your pets a burden or allies? Dogs guard and warn, cats hunt pests, even rabbits and chickens become food sources. This episode explores the symbiotic survival relationship between humans and animals in the end times.
item.itunes:title: EP001 - Pets in the Apocalypse
item.itunes:summary: When doomsday comes, are your pets a burden or allies? Exploring the symbiotic survival relationship between humans and animals.
